title: Trace Entry
description: Schema for a single enforcement trace entry written by governance-package writeTrace / cli emitTrace / mcp handleToolCall. executorIdentity is optional per ADR-003 (Craig's Q4 clarification).

skillHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the resolved skill content

inputHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the operator input for this call

outputRef.description: Artefact path or reference identifier for the output

surfaceType.description: Surface class that produced this trace: cli, mcp-interactive, github-agent

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the trace entry

executorIdentity.description: Optional: identity of the executing agent or operator. Optional per ADR-003 — second-line reviewers cannot require its presence.
